Thanks for contributing. Confirm each box below — PRs that skip the checklist tend to stall.

## Resource

- **Title:**
- **URL:**
- **Section it belongs in:**

## Why it belongs

<!-- One or two sentences. What does this teach or do that the existing entries don't? -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Description is ≤ 18 words and ends with a period
- [ ] Link resolves on a fresh browser (no 404, no soft 404, no surprise paywall)
- [ ] Resource is current (≤ 18 months old) or genuinely evergreen
- [ ] I have used this resource and can vouch for it
- [ ] Entry is placed in the most specific section (not the most prominent one)
- [ ] Tags applied where useful: `[paid]`, `[requires signup]`, `[community]`, `[2026]`, `[2025]`, `[uk]`
- [ ] I have no commercial relationship with this resource, or I have disclosed it below
